elements.name: Title
texts: "A fantastic display of lightning which continued for nearly two hours"

elements.name: Description
texts: "Fourteen years passed [from 1918] before there is mention in the records of another such violent upheaval of the waters…"

elements.name: Source
texts: Curtayne, Alice, Lough Derg: St. Patrick’s Purgatory, p. 142

elements.name: Publisher
texts: Burns Oats and Washbourn, Ltd., London and Dublin

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: "Fourteen years passed [from 1918] before there is mention in the records of another such violent upheaval of the waters… Five days later, in the evening, when all the pilgrims were landed, another furious storm broke out this time with a fantastic display of lightning which continued for nearly two hours, and a deafening barrage of thunder, reverberating through the mountains."
